name: perform-font-persist
note: Sizing model v3 AUTO-FIT-THEN-WRAP (operator-refined 2026-07-24), persistence goalpost: the stage OPENS in auto-fit (scale derived from the viewport, clamped to [0.8, 2.2]); A+ steps from the CURRENT EFFECTIVE scale into a persisted MANUAL size that survives song changes AND a full reload (perfprefs fontScale + fontMode). Red-first history: v1 force-reset the size every open; the v2->v3 A- bug stepped from a stale stored value instead of the effective one. All size assertions here are BASELINE-RELATIVE (auto-fit means the opening scale depends on content + viewport, not a constant).

seed.roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1: [{"id":"pa","t":"Persist Song A","a":"Me","y":2026,"d":"Mine","custom":true,"forkOf":"k1","seq":["C","G"],"sheet":[["Verse","[C]sing a little line [G]here tonight"]]},{"id":"pb","t":"Persist Song B","a":"Me","y":2026,"d":"Mine","custom":true,"forkOf":"k2","seq":["Am","F"],"sheet":[["Verse","[Am]another little line [F]for the night"]]}]

steps.label: stage open on Persist Song A in AUTO-FIT: --pscale sits in the clamp band [0.8, 2.2] and no row overflows - record the effective baseline
steps.js: (function(){var p=document.querySelector('.perform');if(!p||!p.classList.contains('on'))return false;var t=document.getElementById('pTitle');if(!t||t.textContent.indexOf('Persist Song A')===-1)return false;var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var sc=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(pSheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));if(!(sc>=0.799&&sc<=2.201))return false;var cs=getComputedStyle(pSheet);var avail=pSheet.clientWidth-(parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0)-(parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)||0);var rows=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!rows.length)return false;for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){if(rows[i].scrollWidth>avail+1)return false;}window.__base=sc;return true;})()

steps.label: A+ x3 steps from the EFFECTIVE baseline: --pscale == min(2.2, baseline + 0.3), strictly larger than the baseline, and the manual size + mode are already persisted
next song (Persist Song B): the manual size HOLDS across the song change (no auto re-fit stomps it)
SESSION PERSISTENCE: after a full reload the stage reopens in MANUAL mode at the exact persisted size (--pscale == perfprefs.fontScale, fontMode 'manual' restored - not the auto-fit value)
and the Auto button returns to auto-fit: tapping it re-fits into the clamp band and persists fontMode 'auto'
